struct ServiceConfig {
    name: String,
    endpoint: String,
}

struct UpstreamClient {
    name: String,
    connected: bool,
}

async fn init_service(configs: Vec<ServiceConfig>) -> Vec<UpstreamClient> {
    let mut clients = Vec::new();
    for cfg in configs {
        // BAD: eagerly connect to every upstream, even optional ones
        let client = connect_upstream(&cfg.endpoint).await;
        clients.push(UpstreamClient {
            name: cfg.name,
            connected: true,
        });
    }
    clients
}

async fn connect_upstream(endpoint: &str) -> bool {
    // simulate connection
    true
}
